tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Block_ICMP_Egress"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "caldera-br"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set service "PING"
set schedule "always"
set comments "Block ICMP egress from UbuntuComputer to outside, allow LAN pings via separate policy"
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show system interface
config system interface
    edit "port1"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 7.0.14.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set lldp-reception enable
        set role wan
        set snmp-index 1
    next
    edit "port2"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set device-identification enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set role lan
        set snmp-index 2
    next
    edit "port3"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 3
next
    edit "port4"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 4
    next
    edit "port5"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 5
    next
    edit "port6"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 6
    next
    edit "port7"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 7
    next
    edit "port8"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
set snmp-index 8
    next
    edit "port9"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 9
    next
    edit "port10"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 10
    next
    edit "naf.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set src-check disable
        set snmp-index 11
    next
    edit "l2t.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set snmp-index 12
    next
    edit "ssl.root"
set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set alias "SSL VPN interface"
        set snmp-index 13
    next
    edit "fortilink"
        set vdom "root"
        set fortilink enable
        set ip 10.255.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping fabric
        set type aggregate
        set lldp-reception enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set snmp-index 14
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Allow_HTTP_Src_Ubuntu"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set action accept
set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
set schedule "always"
set nat enable
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 36d3d8f8-21e2-51f1-e54f-7fcee4961af8
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Allow_HTTP_Src_Ubuntu"
        set uuid 98d2d1f6-250e-51f1-9335-4ccbdbdc93dc
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
next
    edit 3
        set name "Block_ICMP_Egress"
        set uuid 9e65a31e-250e-51f1-fc76-745296cbbdd9
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic disable
        set comments "Block ICMP egress from UbuntuComputer to outside, allow LAN pings via separate policy"
    next
    edit 4
        set name "Allow_LAN_ICMP"
        set uuid a88ece9c-250e-51f1-35eb-e1d76578b790
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port2"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "LAN_NET"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
